content.en:
Next, Ye Tian didn't find any more precious treasures in the small universe in the body of the Silver Horn Ancestor God.

But there were a lot of other treasures, which also made Ye Tian gain a huge harvest.

"It's a pity that the Silver Horn Ancestral God only has one companion arcana, but he hasn't collected other supreme treasures!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

However, this is not to say that the Silver Horn Ancestor God is not rich, but the Silver Horn Ancestor God is in the early stage of the universe, and at that time, the strongest treasure of the universe has basically not been bred.

If the Silver Horn Ancestor God wants to obtain the Supreme Treasure, he can only go to the ruins of other cosmic eras to plunder, but those ruins are basically opportunities left for the younger generations, and the Silver Horn Ancestral God is inherently powerful, and there is no way to enter those places of chance, and there is no way to obtain the Supreme Treasure.

In addition, in the early stage of the universe, the cultivation system had just been born, and the cultivation system of the universe was not prosperous, and even the Silver Horn Ancestor God could not obtain too many treasures.

And those resources cannot be preserved forever, and they are naturally annihilated in the years.

Ye Tian was now able to obtain the Companion Supreme Treasure Broken Sword, plus some treasures, which was already a big enough harvest.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian no longer stayed in the small universe of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, and continued to bombard along a spatial crack, and then rushed out of the small universe along the spatial fluctuations and came to the outside world.

......

On the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, Ye Tian's figure emerged.

Subsequently.

He continued to collect the blood of the ancestral god at the heart of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, he didn't need the blood of the ancestral god, but if he had the opportunity in the future, he might be able to trade with other innate gods.

Therefore, there is absolutely no harm in collecting more blood of the ancestral gods.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to collect all the blood of the ancestral gods, and a total of 86 blood crystals of the ancestral gods were collected.

At this time, Ye Tian obviously sensed that the aura of the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestor God was slowly decreasing, and the coercion was also decreasing.

Obviously, after losing all the blood crystals of the Ancestral God, the supreme power of the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestral God was equivalent to being taken away some, and the coercion was naturally not as good as before.

But even so, the tomb of the ancestral god is difficult to collapse, this is the place where the ancestral god is buried in heaven and earth, and it is difficult to destroy it under the blessing of the origin of the universe.

And Ye Tian also had no way to take away the corpse of the ancestral god, because the universe did not allow it, and being able to take away the blood of the ancestral god was already the largest allowable range.

Then, Ye Tian went to the Ancestral God Temple again, took away some of the resources inside the Ancestral God Temple, and at the same time found 14 Blood Crystals of the Ancestral God.

In this way, Ye Tian now has 100 Ancestral God Blood Crystals, plus a large number of resource treasures.

"This tomb of the ancestral god is of no value to me now, it's time to leave!"

Ye Tian flew quickly, and soon came to the exit, forcibly rushed out of the exit, left the tomb of the ancestral god, and returned to the outside world.

After Ye Tian came back, he didn't refine the companion treasure of the Silver Horn Ancestral God for the first time, this companion treasure was not suitable for him at the moment, and even if he refined, it would be difficult for him to exert the power of the companion treasure, after all, it was just a sword, and what he needed was a knife weapon.

Therefore, he must find someone to transform this companion Supreme Treasure Broken Sword into a perfect blade.

"Who are you looking for?"

Ye Tian pondered.

Ordinary masters who are proficient in refining weapons can't refine weapons of this level at all, and even if it is easier to transform, it is not something that ordinary people can do.

For example, Ye Tian himself, although he also has the talent of refining weapons, he has little experience, and he is completely unable to transform this companion Supreme Treasure Broken Sword.

In addition, the transformation of the associated Arcana requires a strong cultivation, and without the support of a strong cultivation, it is impossible to successfully transform, and the forced transformation can only transform a more inferior defective product.

Ye Tian thought back to the information of the high-level of the human race, and finally had a goal.

"Heavenly Venerable—Flame Heavenly Venerable!"

The Flame Heavenly Venerable is one of the Celestial Venerables of the Terran Race, and is proficient in refining weapons, and is one of the three major refining masters of the Terran Clan, and his status even surpasses that of ordinary Celestial Venerable powerhouses.

Moreover, the Agni Heavenly Venerable is not a person of the nine supreme forces, but a casual cultivator with his own dojo, the Agni Heavenly Palace.

The Agni Heavenly Palace is in the Holy City, and the Agni Heavenly Venerable has been staying in the Agni Heavenly Palace to forge weapons, and the nine supreme-level forces are all connected with the Agni Heavenly Venerable, and often let the Agni Heavenly Venerable build weapons.

With the status and strength of the Agni Celestial Venerable, ordinary people naturally can't see the Agni Celestial Venerable, let alone let the Agni Celestial Venerable build weapons.

Even many powerful cosmic gods were not qualified to see the Flame Celestial Venerable, and only some Lords and Celestial Venerables of the same level could be expected to meet the Flame Celestial Venerable.

"My potential is unlimited, and many Supremes are optimistic about me, but it is rumored that Agni Tianzun has a strong temperament, he doesn't like to climb dragons and phoenixes, and he doesn't care about my status and status, he has time to be stubborn and doesn't even give face to the Supreme. If I had come to the door directly, I don't think he would have seen me!"

Ye Tian pondered.

If he asks the Kunwu Supreme for help, then it's okay.

However, he can't ask Kunwu Supreme for help with everything, and this matter is a private matter, and it is not a big matter, so it is a little inappropriate to let Kunwu Supreme help.

Next, Ye Tian began to collect information about the Flame Heavenly Venerable.

Half a month later.

Ye Tian flipped through the information of the Flame Heavenly Venerable, and finally had a way.

According to Ye Tian's investigation, Agni Tianzun has a younger generation, known as the Bright Moon Fairy, not only is his strength very strong, but his refining talent is also very good, almost inheriting the attainments of Agni Tianzun's refining weapon, just the cultivation of the ninth order peak of the galaxy level, he can refine the origin artifact.

Of course, the success rate of the Bright Moon Fairy in refining the Origin Artifact is very low, only one percent, but the success rate of refining the best artifact is almost one hundred percent.

If the Bright Moon Fairy is allowed to continue to exercise, there is hope that the treasure will be refined in the future.

Only by refining an Arcana-level weapon can it be called a Refining Divine Master, and the Flame Heavenly Venerable can not only easily refine an ordinary Arcana, but also a top-level Arcana.

And the top treasure is also the strongest weapon that the human race can refine at present, the strongest treasure can only be conceived by heaven and earth, and it is difficult to refine it with human weapon attainments.

It stands to reason that the Bright Moon Fairy's refining attainments are so strong, and he is even expected to reach the level of Agni Tianzun in the future, but it is a pity that the cultivation talent of the Bright Moon Fairy is not good, and he only has a celestial-level cultivation talent.

The human race does have a way to raise the cultivation talent of the Celestial level to the Universe level cultivation talent, but everything is not a 100% thing, and the Flame Heavenly Venerable once used a treasure to improve the cultivation talent of the Bright Moon Fairy, and the success rate should be very high, but in the end it failed.

This kind of treasure that can improve cultivation talent, the first time you use it is the best effect, and the effect will not work if you use it later.

Therefore, the luck of the Bright Moon Fairy is considered to be poor to the limit, and there is no way to upgrade to the universe level, and there is no way to impact the cosmic god realm.

The age of the Bright Moon Fairy is already very large, although the appearance is still young, but if he can't reach the level of the cosmic god in one day, even if he uses more treasures to prolong his life, he will not be able to live forever.

Therefore, Agni Tianzun was very distressed, and he had been looking for treasures that could increase his lifespan by many years and treasures that could improve his cultivation talent.

"Hahaha, I happen to have half of the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart in my hand, which can cast five Chaos level cultivation talents, and the success rate is almost one hundred percent. Such a rare treasure as the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, which even the human race can't obtain, was obtained by luck from the Void Realm, and I am definitely qualified to negotiate a deal with the Flame Heavenly Venerable!"

Ye Tian said with confidence.
